2012 ADA Standards for Accessible Design for Public Accommodations and Commercial Facilities: Title III 301 General 301.1 Scope. The provisions of Chapter 3 shall apply where required by Chapter 2 or where referenced by a requirement in this document. Floor and ground surfaces shall be stable, firm, and slip resistant and shall comply with 302. EXCEPTIONS: 1. Within animal containment areas, floor and ground surfaces shall not be required to be stable, firm, and slip resistant. 2. Areas of sport activity shall not be required to comply with 302. 302 Floor or Ground Surfaces 302.2 Carpet. Carpet or carpet tile shall be securely attached and shall have a firm cushion, pad, or backing or no cushion or pad.
